title: The J.M. Smucker Company Proves Why Staples Are Outperforming
text: The J.M. Smucker Company beat and raised guidance proving once again why the consumer staples group is one to be in for 2022 and 2023.

title: The J. M. Smucker Company's (SJM) CEO Mark Smucker on Q1 2023 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: The J. M. title: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) Ups View on Q1 Earnings & Sales Beat
text: The J.M. Smucker's (SJM) first-quarter results reflect favorable consumer demand and positive pricing impacts, while cost inflation and product recall impacts are deterrents. Management ups guidance.

title: Smucker (SJM) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Smucker (SJM) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 33.60% and 1.34%, respectively, for the quarter ended July 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: J.M. Smucker adj. EPS drops on Jif recall but company hikes its 2023 view
text: J.M. Smucker Co SJM, -1.45% said Tuesday its first-quarter profit fell 29% to $109.8 million, or $1.03 a share, from $153.9 million, or $1.42 a share, in the year-ago quarter. The jelly maker's adjusted profit fell 12% to $1.67 a share as the company absorbed the impact of its Jif peanut butter product recall.

title: 3 Fresh Ideas From BofA Securities With Solid Upside Potential
text: Markets have been turning lower recently, after a powerhouse month of July. With this rally seemingly cooling off, investors are looking at where they can keep and even grow their gains.

title: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) Readies for Q1 Earnings: Things to Note
text: The J.M. Smucker's (SJM) first-quarter results are likely to reflect escalated cost concerns and the impact of the product recall, whereas efficient pricing and coffee portfolio strength bode well.

title: Can Smucker (SJM) Keep the Earnings Surprise Streak Alive?
text: Smucker (SJM) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.
